---
title: Collaborative Apps
description: A recommended Syncular shape for shared workspaces, presence, and optional CRDT-backed collaboration.
---

# Collaborative Apps

## Use this recipe when

- multiple users work in the same project, room, or workspace
- most product state is durable records, but some fields need richer collaboration
- you want presence and fast wake-ups without giving up a server-authoritative sync model

## Recommended shape

- shared scope boundary such as `project_id`, `room_id`, or `workspace_id`
- durable records sync through normal table handlers and commit-log pull/push
- presence runs over realtime for ephemeral online state
- Yjs is optional for rich collaborative subdocuments, not a replacement for the whole data model

## Prioritize these guides

- [Realtime](/docs/build/realtime)
- [Presence](/docs/build/presence)
- [Yjs](/docs/build/yjs)
- [Data Modeling](/docs/build/data-modeling)
- [Troubleshooting](/docs/operate/troubleshooting)

## Watch-outs

- separate durable product records from ephemeral presence or cursor state
- test reconnect and concurrent edit flows early
- if your whole product is effectively a CRDT document, compare this shape against [Jazz](/docs/introduction/comparison/vs-jazz)
